title: Visi-cube
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:9visicube.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] showing [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]] a visi-cube of his sister, [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]].]]
'''Visi-cubes''' were small, hand-held, cube-shaped devices which could capture and display images. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] used one to record the corruption of [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] and show it to her brother, [[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 37}} {{1st}}
